task_description: Set up a complete test automation suite from scratch for a Next.js 16 task manager app. Install and configure Jest + React Testing Library, create Supabase mocks, write unit tests for server actions and middleware, and write component tests for AddTaskForm and TaskList.

verification.summary: All 45 tests pass across 6 test suites (1.96s). Semantic review v2 verdict: APPROVED. Tests cover server actions (16), login (4), signup (4), middleware (11), AddTaskForm (5), TaskList (9). Review feedback addressed: redirect-as-throw mock, dead code removal, clarifying comments.
